title: HubSpot vs Customer.io (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: HubSpot vs Customer.io: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between HubSpot and Customer.io comes down to your specific use case. HubSpot is built for businesses that want email and CRM in one platform, while Customer.io targets product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages.

comparison_table.tool_a: Businesses That Want Email And Crm In One Platform
comparison_table.tool_b: Product And Growth Teams Sending Behaviour-Triggered Messages

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on businesses that want email and CRM in one platform
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages

faq.a: It depends on your use case. HubSpot wins for businesses that want email and CRM in one platform, while Customer.io is stronger for product and growth teams sending behaviour-triggered messages.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, HubSpot or Customer.io?
faq.a: HubSpot starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Customer.io to HubSpot?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
